The '''Tapani Federation''' was the government of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. Established as a "democratic" alternative to the [[Tapani Empire|hereditary monarchy]] founded by [[Emperor (Tapani)|Emperor]] [[Shey Tapani]], the Tapani Federation was intended to be more "inclusive" of the other beings of the sector. In practice, the Tapani Federation was a way for the other [[Tapani Noble Houses|Noble Houses]] to finally have some say in the running of the sector, and the [[Freeworlds Territory|Freeworlds]] were denied any meaningful role in the government.

The Tapani Federation was run by the [[Great Council (Tapani Federation)|Great Council]]. The day to day decisions were made by a [[Prime Minister (Tapani Federation)|Prime Minister]] chosen by the Great Council.
